GOcontext 0.1.0
  • Get started
    • Motivation
  • Reference
  • News

Example GO cellular component graph

Source: R/data-go.R
go_cc.Rd

A Gene Ontology (GO) graph restricted to the Cellular Component (CC) ontology. This dataset is intended for use in examples and documentation.

Format

An S4 GO object containing term metadata and the parent–child DAG structure.

Source

Gene Ontology

Details

The object is of class GO and contains GO term metadata and parent–child relationships for the CC ontology.

The graph was created with:


load_go(ont = "CC")

Examples

data("go_cc", package = "GOcontext")
go_cc
#> An object of class "GO"
#> Slot "ontology":
#> [1] "CC"
#> 
#> Slot "version":
#> [1] "3.22.0"
#> 
#> Slot "ids":
#>    [1] "GO:0000015" "GO:0000109" "GO:0000110" "GO:0000111" "GO:0000112"
#>    [6] "GO:0000113" "GO:0000118" "GO:0000120" "GO:0000123" "GO:0000124"
#>   [11] "GO:0000126" "GO:0000127" "GO:0000131" "GO:0000133" "GO:0000136"
#>   [16] "GO:0000137" "GO:0000138" "GO:0000139" "GO:0000142" "GO:0000144"
